paper_title: Regional Attention with Architecture-Rebuilt 3D Network for RGB-D Gesture Recognition

network_structure.cell_architecture: Each cell has two input nodes, four intermediate nodes, and one output node

cell_1.operation: convolution kernels with small receptive fields

cell_2.operation: convolution kernels with small receptive fields

cell_3.purpose: capture abstract and semantically high-level features

challenges_addressed: focusing on gesture regions both spatially and temporally
approach_summary: Uses NAS to rebuild the structure of Inception Modules in I3D to create different structures that fit multi-scale features, with different cells for different feature types
title: Regional Attention with Architecture-Rebuilt 3D Network for RGB-D Gesture Recognition
